title: stizolobium inflexum
intro: Stizolobium inflexum, also known as the Mexican kidney bean, is a type of legume native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Stizolobium inflexum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues, among others. Herbal preparations of Stizolobium inflexum often involve drying and crushing the plant's seeds or roots to make teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
